indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space provides ample room for movement and comfort.

indicators.name: Natural light from skylights
indicators.rationale: Natural light can reduce eye strain and improve mood.

indicators.name: Concrete floor
indicators.rationale: A concrete floor is durable and easy to clean, but may be cold and less comfortable than carpet.

reasoning_summary: The space is spacious and well-lit, making it suitable for solo computer work. However, the concrete floor could be less comfortable for extended periods.
